storage.notes: Records to onboard microSD and/or an NVR without a subscription fee; optional cloud storage also available.

features: face detection and face capture analytics
built-in card reader for integration with Speco Access (access control)
tampering and door-contact alarms, remote door-unlock function
noise suppression and echo cancellation on two-way audio
controlled via the Speco Blue App; compatible with Speco Blue VMS and SecureGuard Client
release_notes: Launched November 2024. This is Speco's first video doorbell product, distinct from their turret/dome/bullet camera lines — built around the Speco Blue App/VMS ecosystem and Speco Access integration rather than the ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance stated for most of their other IP cameras. ONVIF conformance was not stated for this specific model in any source reviewed.

frigate.notes: ONVIF conformance not stated for this model in any source reviewed (unlike Speco's turret/dome line, which explicitly states ONVIF Profile G/S/T) — do not assume ONVIF works without checking the camera's own web UI first. RTSP is listed as supported in general Speco doorbell documentation but the exact path was not found.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF support unconfirmed; may require the generic RTSP/MJPEG camera integration rather than the ONVIF integration until ONVIF support is confirmed.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model.
